name: sketch
description: AI image generation code creation using Gemini API. Handles text-to-image generation, image editing, and prompt optimization. Use when image generation code is needed.

capabilities.summary: Generate images from text prompts via Gemini API
Edit existing images with AI-guided modifications
Optimize prompts for better image generation results
Apply artistic styles to image generation
Generate game/web assets with consistent style
Generate images grounded with Google Image Search (Nano Banana 2)

recipes.label: Batch
recipes.when: Generate many variants with consistent seed and style (cards, hero sets, character sheets)

recipes.label: Style
recipes.when: Match an existing brand or reference style, or anchor cross-asset cohesion

recipes.label: Upscale
recipes.when: Post-process: upscale, masked inpaint, or outpaint a base render

recipes.label: Cinematic
recipes.when: Photographic / cinematographic prompt construction — camera, lens, lighting, depth of field, film stock, composition rules

recipes.label: Provenance
recipes.when: C2PA + SynthID + EXIF AI-disclosure metadata, watermarking, takedown response, and platform compliance

recipes.label: Policy
recipes.when: Content-policy + brand-safety guardrails, NSFW filter, deepfake / likeness rules, regulatory compliance
